overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character with pink hair walking through Night City at night. The character travels from a covered walkway under an overpass, across a wet intersection with futuristic vehicles, past NCPD police officers, and along neon-lit sidewalks with vibrant holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the yellow tactile sidewalk under the concrete overpass, following a pedestrian with red hair ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking ahead of ego at a steady pace

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating a covered walkway below
distinctive bright yellow textured sidewalk panels for pedestrian guidance
tall street lamp with glowing light fixture
metal scaffolding structure attached to building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass in Night City, following the player character with pink hair walking along a bright yellow tactile sidewalk. The area is artificially lit with a moderate crowd of pedestrians walking in the same direction. The environment is sheltered from weather, with storefronts visible through the scaffolding on the left.

events.description: exits the covered overpass walkway into the open night air of a city intersection
teal sports car drives through the crosswalk from right to left

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the striped crosswalk and walking across the intersection while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: futuristic teal sports car driving across the intersection crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
large illuminated holographic advertisements and building signage visible across the intersection
wide open street intersection with multiple lanes and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open urban intersection, transitioning from sheltered to exposed environment. The ground changes to striped crosswalk markings as the character crosses the street. A teal sports car drives past through the intersection, and large digital billboards become visible in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with police presence and gym signage

events.description: encounters NCPD police officers and police vehicles on the sidewalk ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wet concrete sidewalk past police officers and futuristic police vehicles

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer standing guard next to police vehicle with illuminated livery

entered.detail: futuristic police vehicle with glowing NCPD lettering and emergency lights
illuminated sign reading BODYWEIGHT with cyan neon lighting
wet concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk where NCPD police officers stand near their futuristic patrol cars. The Bodyweight gym sign glows with cyan neon on the left, while digital billboards and neon storefronts illuminate the street. The pavement reflects the vibrant neon colors of the surrounding advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past various neon-lit storefronts and parked vehicles along the reflective sidewalk

entered.detail: purple and pink neon sign reading BRAIN WASH above a storefront entrance
tall vertical holographic advertisement display showing animated content
row of parked futuristic vehicles along the curb

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down the neon-drenched commercial street, passing the distinctive Brain Wash storefront with its purple neon signage. The wet pavement creates vivid reflections of the pink and orange neon lights from the surrounding buildings. Parked cars line the right side of the street as the character moves deeper into the illuminated urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered concrete underpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched urban corridor. It begins by following a pink-haired character along a bright yellow tactile sidewalk beneath a massive overpass, moving past pedestrians and storefronts tucked under scaffolding. As the character emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into an exposed intersection where the ground shifts to striped crosswalks and a teal sports car streaks past under the glow of distant digital billboards. The camera then follows the character onto a wet concrete sidewalk, passing NCPD officers and their patrol cars while the environment becomes saturated with cyan neon from a gym sign and shimmering reflections on the pavement. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the illuminated street, passing the purple signage of a Brain Wash storefront as the wet ground mirrors a vivid array of pink and orange lights.
